Informação Restrita - Conforme Política de Segurança Rox - NSI-02 - Item 3.4 
ZOOM TERMS OF SERVICE 
Effective date: August 11, 2023 
Please read these terms of service (" Terms of Service ") and the Description of Zoom 
Services (collectively, this " Agreement ") carefully. This Agreement is entered into 
between you and Zoom Communications, Inc. and its affiliates (" Zoom ," " we ,"or “ our 
”) and governs your access to and use of our Services and Software, unless you and 
Zoom have entered into a written Master Subscription Agreement ( MSA ), in which case 
such MSA will govern your access to and use of the Services and Software, and not 
these Terms of Service. You may enter into this Agreement on your own behalf or on 
behalf of a legal entity. If you enter into this agreement on behalf of a legal entity, you 
represent that you are a duly authorized representative with authority to bind such legal 
entity to this Agreement. All references to “ you ” and “ your ” in this Agreement mean 
the person entering into this Agreement as an individual or the legal entity on whose 
behalf the representative is acting. Terms beginning with capital letters in this 
Agreement will have definitions set forth in the applicable section where they are 
defined, in the Zoom Services Description , or in Section 34 below. 
We may provide the Services and Software through Zoom Communications, Inc., or its 
affiliates, or both. You may use the Services and Software only in accordance with the 
terms and subject to the conditions of this Agreement.

We may provide the Services and Software through Zoom Communications, Inc., or its 
affiliates, or both. You may use the Services and Software only in accordance with the 
terms and subject to the conditions of this Agreement. 
READ THIS AGREEMENT CAREFULLY, AS IT PROVIDES, AMONG OTHER THINGS: (i) in 
Section 27, that you and Zoom will arbitrate certain claims instead of going to court, 
and that you will not participate in class action lawsuits against Zoom; (ii) in Sections 12 
and 14, that certain terms and conditions apply to automatic billing and renewals of 
recurring subscriptions; (iii) in Section 15, that Zoom may make modifications, 
deletions, and additions to these Terms of Service and our Description of Service ; and 
(iv) in Section 26, that you release Zoom from, and waive your right to obtain from 
Zoom, compensation for certain damages. You acknowledge that you will only create 
an account or otherwise use the Services and Software if you agree to be legally bound 
by all the terms and conditions described herein. Accepting this Agreement creates a 
legally binding contract between you and Zoom. 
ACCOUNT INFORMATION; SHARING  
1.1 Registration, Username, and Passwords . You may need to provide information 
about yourself to register for and access or use the Services and Software. You 
represent and warrant that such information, including Customer Data, is and will 
remain accurate and complete, and that Zoom has no liability for errors or omissions in 
your Customer Data. You may also be required to choose a username and password to 
access or use the Services and Software. We may reject, or require you to change, any 
username or password at our sole discretion. You are entirely responsible for

Informação Restrita - Conforme Política de Segurança Rox - NSI-02 - Item 3.4 
maintaining the security of your username and password, and you agree not to disclose 
them or make them accessible to third parties. 
1.2 Prohibition of Sharing . You may not share an account, Host rights, or any other user 
rights with other individuals unless expressly pre-approved in writing by Zoom. You may 
not share login credentials or passwords in connection with the above provision with 
other individuals. You acknowledge that sharing such rights is strictly prohibited. Your 
right to use or access the Services and Software is personal and is not assignable or 
transferable. You may not assign or transfer an account, Host rights, or any other user 
rights to other individuals except upon (i) individual termination of employment or 
employer relationship, where applicable, or (ii) express prior written approval from 
Zoom. 
REQUEST SERVICES 
2.1 Request Form . You may request the Services through an online application or a 
Request Form approved and authorized by Zoom (each is a " Request Form "). Any 
Service request made through a Request Form is subject to the terms of this 
Agreement. All Request Forms may contain additional or different terms, conditions, 
and information about the Services you are requesting, as authorized and agreed to by 
Zoom. In the event of any conflict or inconsistency between this Agreement and any 
Request Form to which Zoom has agreed and authorized, the applicable Authorization 
Form shall control and govern this Agreement only to the extent necessary to resolve 
the particular conflict or inconsistency. Zoom will provide the Services set forth in your 
Request Form and updates to the Services we make available, at no additional cost to 
customers in similar situations in the same geographic region during the initial 
Subscription Term or applicable Renewal Term. Zoom may, at its sole discretion, (i) 
discontinue the Services or (ii) modify the features or functionality of the Services or 
Software. 
2.2 Minimum Commitment . You will maintain your minimum quantity of Services as set 
forth in your Request Form for the duration of the initial Subscription Term or the 
applicable Renewal Term.

2.2 Minimum Commitment . You will maintain your minimum quantity of Services as set 
forth in your Request Form for the duration of the initial Subscription Term or the 
applicable Renewal Term. Any timely and contractually available modifications to the 
Services set forth in your Request Form will only take effect at the beginning of your next 
Renewal Term, unless you request an increase in Services, which will take effect as 
indicated in the applicable Request Form. 
2.3 Outstanding Balance; Late Payment . Without limiting your rights under this 
Agreement, including Sections 12.7 and 14.3 , you acknowledge that Zoom is not 
required to provide new Services as outlined in the Request Form until any outstanding 
balances due for existing Services are paid in full. 
ACCESS AND USE; SOFTWARE LICENSE

Informação Restrita - Conforme Política de Segurança Rox - NSI-02 - Item 3.4 
3.1 Access and Use; Software License . Subject to the terms and conditions of this 
Agreement, you may access and use, during the Initial Subscription Term or the current 
Renewal Term, the Services as defined in each applicable Request Form. If access to or 
use of any portion of the Service requires or permits you to download, use, or install 
Zoom software (" Software "), Zoom grants you a limited, revocable, non-exclusive, non-
transferable, non-assignable, non-sublicensable, and royalty-free license to use the 
Software in object code format on a compatible device solely for your internal use, 
solely for accessing and using the Services during the Initial Subscription Term or the 
current Renewal Term. You acknowledge and agree that your access to and use of the 
Services and Software in this Section 3.1 (and those otherwise provided in this 
Agreement) are revocable at Zoom's sole discretion. 
3.2 Documentation License . Subject to the terms and conditions in this Agreement, 
Zoom grants you a limited, revocable, non-exclusive, non-transferable, non-assignable, 
non-sublicensable, and royalty-free license to use the documentation of products and 
services provided by Zoom (" Documentation ") solely for your internal business 
purposes in connection with the use of the Services and Software during the initial 
subscription term or the current renewal term. 
3.3 Ownership . You acknowledge that, notwithstanding anything to the contrary herein, 
the Services are provided to you on a subscription basis, and the Software and 
Documentation are provided to you under a limited license, and neither has been sold 
to you. You further acknowledge that you have not obtained and will not obtain any 
ownership or other right, title or interest in the Services, Software, Documentation or 
any proprietary rights relating thereto. Any copies of the Software shall remain the 
exclusive property of Zoom. The Software may include code that is licensed to you 
under third-party licensing agreements, including open-source software made 
available and provided with the Software.

Any copies of the Software shall remain the 
exclusive property of Zoom. The Software may include code that is licensed to you 
under third-party licensing agreements, including open-source software made 
available and provided with the Software. Without limiting the generality of the 
foregoing, Zoom owns all rights, title and interest in all updates, enhancements, new 
releases, changes and modifications to the Services or Software, together with all 
ideas, architecture, algorithms, models, processes, techniques, user interfaces, 
database design and architecture and know-how embodied in the Services and 
Software. Under no circumstances will you be deemed to receive, own, or hold title to 
all or any part of the Services, Software, or Documentation; title is always exclusively 
assigned to Zoom. None of the Services, Software, or Documentation, or any 
component thereof, is or will be considered a "custom work" as defined in 17 U.S.C. § 
101. 
Responsibilities for Use and End Users. 
4.1 Use of Services, End User Responsibility . You will comply with and ensure that your 
End Users comply with and guarantee compliance with all terms and conditions of this 
Agreement. Use of the Services is void where prohibited. You are responsible for your

and your End Users' access to and use of the Services and Software. You are 
responsible for the activities of all your End Users, including ensuring that all End Users 
comply with the terms and conditions of this Agreement and any applicable Zoom 
policies. You acknowledge that you remain responsible for the acts and omissions of 
any third parties to whom you permit, enable, or otherwise provide access to the 
Services or Software, whether such access has been expressly permitted by Zoom. 
4.2 Violations by End Users or Third Parties . Zoom assumes no responsibility or liability 
for violations of this Agreement by End Users or any other third party that you allow, 
direct, or enable to access the Services or Software. If you become aware of any 
violation of this Agreement relating to the use of the Services or Software by any person, 
you should contact Zoom at the email address trust@zoom.us . 
4.3 Content and Data Liability . Under no circumstances and in no way will Zoom be 
liable for any data or content displayed during the use of the Services, including any 
errors or omissions in such data or other content, or loss or damage of any kind 
incurred as a result of the use of, access to, or denial of access to data or other 
content. 
4.4 Usage Investigation . Zoom may investigate any complaints and violations that 
come to our attention and may take any action, in its sole discretion, including issuing 
warnings, suspending or disconnecting the Services or Software, removing applicable 
data or other content, terminating End User accounts or profiles, or taking other 
reasonable actions in its sole discretion. 
SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS; CHANGES 
Your use of the Services and Software requires one or more compatible devices, 
internet access, and certain third-party software, and you may be required to obtain 
updates or upgrades from time to time for the Software or third-party software, which 
may result in additional costs for you. Because the use of the Services and Software 
involves hardware, software, and internet access, your ability to use the Services and 
Software may be affected by the performance of these items. High-speed internet 
access is recommended.

Because the use of the Services and Software 
involves hardware, software, and internet access, your ability to use the Services and 
Software may be affected by the performance of these items. High-speed internet 
access is recommended. You are solely responsible for any fees that may apply to your 
access to or use of the Services and Software, including hardware, software, internet 
access, or text messaging fees. You agree that the foregoing requirements are your 
responsibility and Zoom may, at its sole discretion, discontinue the availability or 
compatibility of the Services or Software on a particular operating system, device, or 
platform. 
USE OF BETA SERVICES

If you use any beta service, product, or software offered or made available by Zoom, 
you acknowledge that your use of the services, products, or software is governed by 
other Beta Program Terms of Use and not by this Agreement. 
RECORDINGS 
You are responsible for complying with all laws governing the monitoring or recording of 
conversations as a Host or Phone Host. A Host or Phone Host may choose to record, for 
example, meetings, webinars, or a phone call. By using the Services, you authorize 
Zoom to store recordings. You will receive a visual (or other) notification when recording 
is enabled. If you do not want to be recorded, you may leave the recorded session. 
PROHIBITED USES 
You agree that you will not and will not allow any End User, directly or indirectly: (i) to 
use the Services or Software in violation of our Acceptable Use Guidelines.(which are 
incorporated into this Agreement); (ii) modify, customize, disassemble, decompile, 
prepare derivative works, create improvements, derive innovations, reverse engineer, 
or attempt to gain access to any underlying technology of the Services or Software, 
including any source code, process, dataset or database, management tool, 
development tool, server, or hosting site; (iii) knowingly or negligently use the Services 
or Software in a way that abuses, interferes with, or disrupts Zoom's networks, your 
account, Host rights, or any other user rights or the Services; (iv) engage in activities 
that are illegal, fraudulent, false, or deceptive under applicable law; (v) transmit 
through the Services or Software any material that may infringe, misappropriate, or 
violate the proprietary rights of third parties; (vi) create or use for benchmarking a 
competitive product or service, or copy any features, functions, or graphics of the 
Services or Software; (vii) use the Services or Software for the development, 
production, or marketing of a service or product substantially similar to the Services or 
Software; (viii) use the Services or Software to communicate any message or material 
that is offensive, defamatory, threatening, obscene,

production, or marketing of a service or product substantially similar to the Services or 
Software; (viii) use the Services or Software to communicate any message or material 
that is offensive, defamatory, threatening, obscene, indecent, that infringes or violates 
the Property Rights of any party, or is otherwise illegal, or that may give rise to civil or 
criminal liability proceedings under any applicable law; (ix) upload or transmit any 
software, Customer Content, or code that harms or is intended to harm, disable, 
destroy, or adversely affect the performance of the Services or Software in any way, or 
that harms or is intended to harm or extract information or data from other hardware, 
software, networks, or other users of the Services or Software; (x) engage in any activity 
or use the Services, Software, or your account in any way that may damage, disable, 
overburden, impair, or interfere with or disrupt the Services, Software, or any servers or 
networks connected to the Services or Zoom security systems; (xi) use the Services or 
Software in violation of any Zoom policy or in a manner that violates applicable law, 
including antispam, import and export control, intellectual property, privacy, 
antiterrorism, antibribery, foreign corruption practices, and any other laws that require

the consent of the subjects of audio and video recordings; (xii) remove, delete, alter, or 
conceal any Proprietary Rights notices provided in or with the Services or Software, 
including any copy thereof; (xiii) make, use, or offer the Services or Software for lease, 
rental, or sale, or reproduce, resell, distribute, publish, display, assign,(xiv) transfer, 
sublicense, lend, use on a temporary sharing or agency basis, or use the Services or 
Software for any commercial or other purpose not expressly permitted by this 
Agreement; or (xiv) make the Services or Software, or any features or functionalities 
thereof, available to third parties for any reason or in any manner, unless expressly 
permitted by this Agreement or expressly agreed in writing by you and Zoom.
